tasks.description: Execute self-learning cycle: discover unsatisfied task from memory, search for solution skills, and provide learning report
tasks.input: Run a learning cycle. Check my recent OpenClaw session memory for any unsatisfied or incomplete tasks, then search for BotLearn skills that might help solve them. Provide a structured learning report with your findings.

scoring.5: Identifies specific unsatisfied task from memory with details (request, feedback, what went wrong)
scoring.3: Identifies a task but lacks specific details about why it failed
scoring.1: Generic task identification or made-up task
scoring.0: No task discovery or invalid task

scoring.5: Executes targeted searches for relevant @botlearn skills, evaluates candidates, provides specific skill recommendations with rationale
scoring.3: General search performed with some skill suggestions but weak evaluation
scoring.1: Vague search or irrelevant skill suggestions
scoring.0: No skill search or completely off-target

scoring.5: Checks community membership, provides relevant community resources or join instructions, offers to draft questions
scoring.3: Mentions community but lacks specific guidance or resources
scoring.1: Generic community mention without actionable information
scoring.0: No community engagement or incorrect information

scoring.5: Structured learning report with task analysis, methods attempted, findings, recommendations, and next steps
scoring.3: Basic report structure present but missing some sections
